explanation: This LTL property specifies that it is always the case (globally) that transient changes in angular roll acceleration greater than 50deg/sec2/sec do not occur. This captures the requirement that the Inner Loop Roll Regulator shall not command such changes.

The best-fitting LTL template asserts globally (always) that these transient changes above the threshold should not occur. Therefore, we use the 'globally not' template, setting bool_exp3 to the atomic proposition representing transient changes in angular roll acceleration greater than 50 deg/sec^2/sec.
